quotes.text: The best technology choice is the one your team knows. The second best is the one that's actually right. Usually they're different.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best teams are the ones where everyone feels safe to fail. Psychological safety is the ultimate team metric.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your team should be able to disagree and commit. If they can't disagree, there's no trust. If they can't commit, there's no respect.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your team is only as strong as its weakest link. Find it. Strengthen it. Or replace it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your team's biggest asset isn't their skills. It's their ability to work together. Protect it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build a high-performing team is to remove obstacles, not add pressure.
quotes.author: based
